task_completion.description: Verify the project is created with the correct name, status, and priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a project detail view or list view showing the name 'Greenfield Organics Onboarding', Status as 'Draft', and Priority as 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project start and end dates are correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Start Date '02/03/2025' (or '2025-02-03') and End Date '03/14/2025' (or '2025-03-14') in the project details.

task_completion.description: Verify the project description is accurately entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the description text starting with 'Onboarding project for new wholesale client Greenfield Organics...' in the project details.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 6 project tasks are linked to the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Project Tasks' subpanel or related list within the project view. Count the number of tasks; there should be exactly 6.

task_completion.description: Verify the linked tasks have the correct names and dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Project Tasks list for names like 'Account Verification and Setup', 'Product Catalog Review', 'Credit Terms Approval', 'Initial Order Processing', 'Logistics and Delivery Setup', and 'Client Handoff and Go-Live', along with their respective start and end dates.

task_completion.description: Verify the linked tasks have the correct priorities and milestone flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Project Tasks list to ensure priorities are set correctly (High/Medium) and that 'Client Handoff and Go-Live' is marked as a Milestone (Yes), while others are not.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with SuiteCRM 'Create Project' and 'Create Project Task' forms, rather than typing the task description into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: No SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows executing MySQL commands should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: 'Greenfield Organics Onboarding'. Status: 'Draft'. Start Date: '2025-02-03' (or 02/03/2025). End Date: '2025-03-14' (or 03/14/2025). Expected Task Count: 6. The 6 tasks must be linked to the project and match the names, dates, priorities, and milestone statuses provided in the task description (e.g., 'Client Handoff and Go-Live' is the only milestone).
